sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - MATHILDE de Mousson .

zh.lifeSummary: 當Mathilde de Mousson於1080年出生在法國洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克時，她的父親Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar35歲，母親Ermentrude de Bourgogne22歲。她於大約1096年與Adalbert II. von Mörsberg在德國海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 科特布斯波格結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1110年11月10日在法國洛萊莫瑟勒馬利蒙吉利斯-貝內斯特洛福享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mathilde de Mousson于1080年出生在法国洛萊姆斯巴勒迪克时，她的父亲Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar35岁，母亲Ermentrude de Bourgogne22岁。她于大约1096年与Adalbert II. von Mörsberg在德国海因里希_普洛文次 布藍登波格可萊斯 科特布斯波格结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1110年11月10日在法国洛萊莫瑟勒馬利蒙吉利斯-貝內斯特洛福享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mousson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Chantal, Gaston, Monique.
French: from Old French pousson, a spirit made from linseed oil or hemp, hence a metonymic occupational name for someone who made this. In the US, this surname is found mainly in LA.
History: Jean-Bertrand Pousson from Lespiteau in Haute-Garonne, France, married Joséphine Guillory in Opelousas, LA, in 1843.

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Mathilde de Mousson was born in 1080, in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, her father, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, was 35 and her mother, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, was 22. She married Adalbert II. von Mörsberg about 1096, in Burg, Cottbus, Brandenburg, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 10 November 1110, in Marimont-lès-Bénestroff, Moselle, Lorraine, France, at the age of 30.

fr.Burg, Kottbus, Brandenburg, Germany: Burg, Kreis Cottbus, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mathilde de Mousson est née en 1080, à Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, France, son père, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Adalbert II. von Mörsberg environ 1096, à Burg, Kreis Cottbus, Provinz Brandenburg, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 novembre 1110, à Marimont-lès-Bénestroff, Moselle, Lorraine, France, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.Burg, Kottbus, Brandenburg, Germany: Burg, Kreis Cottbus, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland
de.lifeSummary: Als Mathilde de Mousson 1080 in Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar 35 und ihre Mutter Ermentrude de Bourgogne 22. Sie hat um 1096 in Burg, Kreis Cottbus, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Deutschland Adalbert II. von Mörsberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. November 1110 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Marimont-lès-Bénestroff, Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mathilde de Mousson è nata il nel 1080 nel Bar-le-Duc, Meuse, Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Ermentrude de Bourgogne, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Adalbert II. von Mörsberg circa 1096, nel Burg, Kreis Cottbus, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1110, nel Marimont-lès-Bénestroff, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Moussonが1080年にフランスロレィヌメウゼバー-レ-ドウックで生まれた時，父Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Barは35歳，母Ermentrude de Bourgogneは22歳であった。約1096年にドイツプレウssンプロヴィンズ ブランデンブルグクレイス コットブスブルグでAdalbert II. von Mörsbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1110年11月10日にフランスロレィヌモセルマリモント-ルeス-ブeネストロッフで30歳で死去した。

ko.Burg, Kottbus, Brandenburg, Germany: 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 컷버스 버그
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Mousson(이)가 1080년 프랑스 로레이인 우스 바-레-드크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ermentrude de Bourgogne(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1096년 독일 프레우ss 프로빈츠 브랜덴버그 크레이스 컷버스 버그에서 Adalbert II. von Mörsberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1110년 11월 10일 프랑스 로레이인 모셀 마임트-e스-브e네스트로프에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com Adalbert II. von Mörsberg aproximadamente 1096, em Burg, Kreis Cottbus, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. ru.Burg, Kottbus, Brandenburg, Germany: бург, крис коттбус, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mathilde de Mousson родилась в 1080 г. в местности бар-ле-дук, меус, лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Thierry Ier de Montbéliard comte de Bar было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Ermentrude de Bourgogne, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adalbert II. von Mörsberg около 1096 г. в местности бург, крис коттбус, провинз брэнденбург, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 10 ноября 1110 г. в местности маримонт-лeс-бeнестрофф, моселл, лорреаин, Франция в возрасте 30 лет.

Se casó con Adalbert II. von Mörsberg aproximadamente 1096, en Burg, Kreis Cottbus, Provinz Brandenburg, Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1110, en Marimont-lès-Bénestroff, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, a la edad de 30 años.
